name: Coinbase
problem: Buying cryptocurrency too complex for mainstream users
solution: Simple, trusted exchange for buying/selling crypto
traction: 1M users, $20M revenue run rate at Series B
market: Cryptocurrency exchange, potential for billions of users
founder_signal: Brian Armstrong, ex-Airbnb, technical founder with clear vision for crypto adoption
a16z_thesis: Crypto will be as big as the internet. Coinbase is the on-ramp. Strong network effects as liquidity attracts more users. Platform for the decentralized economy.

name: GitHub
problem: Developers need better collaboration tools for code
solution: Social network for code with Git version control
market: 50M+ developers globally, core infrastructure for software
founder_signal: Tom Preston-Werner, Chris Wanstrath - open source leaders
a16z_thesis: Developer tools with network effects. Every new project makes GitHub more valuable. Software eating world means developers become most important profession.

name: Instacart
problem: Grocery shopping is time-consuming, delivery options limited
solution: On-demand grocery delivery from local stores
traction: $10M GMV run rate, operating in 10 cities
market: $800B grocery market in US alone
founder_signal: Apoorva Mehta, ex-Amazon engineer, tried 20 ideas before finding PMF
a16z_thesis: Marketplace with strong network effects. More shoppers attract more stores. Last-mile logistics platform that can expand beyond groceries.

name: Airbnb
problem: Hotels expensive, travel experiences too standardized
solution: Marketplace for unique local stays
market: $500B+ travel and hospitality
founder_signal: Brian Chesky, Joe Gebbia - designers who hustled through early days
a16z_thesis: Two-sided marketplace with massive network effects. Trust and brand moat. Category creation - not competing with hotels, creating new category.

name: Slack
problem: Email is broken for team communication
solution: Real-time messaging platform for work
traction: $25M ARR, 1M daily active users, fastest-growing SaaS ever
market: Communication tool for every knowledge worker globally
founder_signal: Stewart Butterfield, built Flickr, gaming background
a16z_thesis: Bottom-up adoption with viral growth. Strong network effects within orgs. Platform play - developers build on Slack. New UI paradigm for work.

name: Oculus VR
problem: VR hardware too expensive and low quality
solution: High-quality, affordable VR headsets
market: VR/AR could be next computing platform after mobile
founder_signal: Palmer Luckey, teenage hardware hacker, obsessed with VR
a16z_thesis: Contrarian bet on VR when everyone said it was dead. Hardware enabling entirely new platform. If VR is next platform, Oculus is the iPhone.

name: Databricks
problem: Processing big data too complex, expensive
solution: Unified analytics platform built on Apache Spark
traction: 50+ enterprise customers, open source Spark growing rapidly
market: Big data analytics, $50B+ market
founder_signal: Original creators of Apache Spark from Berkeley
a16z_thesis: Open source community creates moat. Every Fortune 500 will need unified data platform. Technical founders who invented the underlying tech.

name: Lyft
problem: Taxis expensive, unreliable, limited supply
solution: Peer-to-peer ridesharing network
market: $100B+ ground transportation market in US
founder_signal: Logan Green, John Zimmer - second-time founders with Zimride
a16z_thesis: Two-sided marketplace with strong local network effects. More riders attract more drivers. Potential to displace car ownership entirely.

name: Pinterest
problem: Hard to organize and discover visual inspiration
solution: Visual discovery and bookmarking platform
traction: 10M users, fastest consumer site to reach this milestone
market: Visual search and shopping, billions of potential users
founder_signal: Ben Silbermann, built multiple products before finding PMF
a16z_thesis: Unique approach to visual content. High-intent users (planning purchases). Network effects through shared boards. Platform for visual commerce.

name: Stripe
problem: Online payments too complex for developers
solution: Developer-first payment infrastructure
market: Global payments, trillions in transaction volume
founder_signal: Collison brothers, technical founders who understand developers
a16z_thesis: Infrastructure for internet economy. Platform with network effects. Technical moat. Every startup will need payments - Stripe becomes default.

name: Roblox
problem: Game development too hard for kids, gaming too passive
solution: Platform where kids create and play games
traction: 5M monthly users, user-generated content growing exponentially
market: Gaming + creativity, Gen Z native platform
founder_signal: David Baszucki, PhD, 20+ years building physics engines
a16z_thesis: UGC platform with massive network effects. Creators attract players attract creators. New type of social network. Future of play.

name: OpenSea
problem: No good marketplace for NFTs
solution: eBay for digital collectibles and NFTs
market: Digital ownership economy, potentially trillions
founder_signal: Devin Finzer, Alex Atallah - crypto-native builders
a16z_thesis: Crypto-native marketplace. NFTs enable digital property rights. Network effects - more buyers attract sellers. Infrastructure for metaverse economy.

name: Clubhouse
problem: Social media is too performative, asynchronous
solution: Drop-in audio conversations
market: Social audio, new format for human connection
founder_signal: Paul Davison (founder of Highlight), Rohan Seth
a16z_thesis: New social primitive. Audio is intimate, high-bandwidth. Network effects through invite graph. Contrarian bet on voice-first social.

name: PagerDuty
problem: IT teams have no good way to manage incidents
solution: Incident management platform for DevOps
market: DevOps tools for millions of developers and IT teams
founder_signal: Alex Solomon - technical founder who felt the pain at Amazon
a16z_thesis: Mission-critical infrastructure. Network effects as integrations grow. Developer-friendly product in massive market.

name: Samsara
problem: Physical operations have no visibility or data
solution: IoT platform for tracking vehicles, equipment, sites
market: Industrial IoT, $100B+ opportunity
founder_signal: Sanjit Biswas, John Bicket - founded Meraki (sold to Cisco for $1.2B)
a16z_thesis: Software eating physical operations. Platform approach with strong network effects. Proven founders. Massive greenfield market.

name: Figma
problem: Design tools still desktop-based, poor collaboration
solution: Browser-based collaborative design tool
market: Design tools for 10M+ designers globally
founder_signal: Dylan Field - 20 years old, Thiel Fellow, obsessed with design tools
a16z_thesis: Cloud-native design tool with multiplayer collaboration. Network effects through shared files. Platform potential as plugins ecosystem grows.

name: Tanium
problem: Enterprise security teams can't see their endpoints
solution: Real-time endpoint visibility and control at scale
market: Endpoint security, $10B+ market
founder_signal: Orion Hindawi, David Hindawi - father-son team, decades in security
a16z_thesis: Technical breakthrough - linear scale vs exponential. Mission-critical for largest orgs. Land-and-expand in security.

name: Rippling
problem: HR systems fragmented, lots of manual work
solution: All-in-one platform for HR, IT, and finance
market: SMB software, every company needs HR/IT tools
founder_signal: Parker Conrad - founded Zenefits, learned from mistakes
a16z_thesis: Compound startup across HR/IT/Finance. Network effects through integrations. Platform approach captures more value as companies grow.

name: Carta
problem: Managing cap tables is painful, opaque
solution: Cap table management and equity platform
market: Private markets infrastructure, millions of companies
founder_signal: Henry Ward - finance background, technical execution
a16z_thesis: Network effects as more companies join. Platform for private markets. Potential to become NASDAQ for private companies.

name: Calm
problem: Mental health crisis, meditation hard to access
solution: Meditation and sleep app
traction: 1M users, top-grossing app in health category
market: Wellness and mental health, $1T+ market
founder_signal: Michael Acton Smith, Alex Tew - serial entrepreneurs
a16z_thesis: Consumer subscription business with strong retention. Category creation in digital wellness. Content moat and brand.

name: Helium
problem: IoT networks expensive to deploy and operate
solution: Decentralized wireless network for IoT devices
market: IoT connectivity, billions of devices need networks
founder_signal: Amir Haleem, Shawn Fanning (Napster founder) - deep wireless expertise
a16z_thesis: Crypto-economic incentives create distributed infrastructure. Network effects - more hotspots improve coverage. New model for physical infrastructure.

name: Retool
problem: Building internal tools takes too long
solution: Low-code platform for internal applications
market: Internal tools for every company with developers
founder_signal: David Hsu - technical founder who felt the pain at Venmo
a16z_thesis: Developer-first low-code. Bottoms-up adoption. Network effects through component sharing. Massive TAM as every company needs internal tools.

name: Benchling
problem: Life science R&D stuck with paper notebooks and Excel
solution: Cloud platform for biotech R&D and data management
market: Life science software, $10B+ opportunity
founder_signal: Sajith Wickramasekara, Ashu Singhal - MIT bio + CS backgrounds
a16z_thesis: Software eating biotech. Network effects through shared protocols. Platform for entire drug discovery process.

name: Cruise
problem: Self-driving car technology needs to advance
solution: Full-stack autonomous vehicle technology
traction: Prototype vehicles driving in SF, technical milestones hit
market: Autonomous vehicles, $10T+ impact on transportation
founder_signal: Kyle Vogt - founded Twitch, hardware + software expertise
a16z_thesis: Bold technical vision. Self-driving will transform transportation. First-mover advantage with real-world data. Platform potential.

name: Lookout
problem: Mobile devices have no security
solution: Mobile security platform for enterprises
traction: 1M users, enterprise traction, freemium model working
market: Mobile security, billions of devices need protection
founder_signal: John Hering, Kevin Mahaffey, James Burgess - security experts
a16z_thesis: Mobile-first security as smartphones become primary computing device. Network effects through threat intelligence. Critical enterprise need.

name: Honor
problem: Home care for seniors is fragmented, low quality
solution: Managed marketplace for senior home care
traction: Operating in 5 cities, 1K caregivers, strong NPS
market: Senior care, $100B+ market with aging demographics
founder_signal: Seth Sternberg - founder of Meebo, passionate about elder care
a16z_thesis: Marketplace with supply-side focus. Network effects in local markets. Massive, underserved market with demographic tailwinds.

name: Dialpad
problem: Business phone systems stuck in past, no intelligence
solution: Cloud phone system with built-in AI
market: Business communications, replacing legacy PBX
founder_signal: Craig Walker - founded GrandCentral (became Google Voice)
a16z_thesis: Voice infrastructure with AI layer. Network effects through shared intelligence. Platform for business communications.

name: Substack
problem: Writers dependent on platforms, hard to monetize
solution: Newsletter platform with built-in payments
market: Creator economy, millions of writers globally
founder_signal: Chris Best, Hamish McKenzie, Jairaj Sethi - media + product backgrounds
a16z_thesis: Unbundling media. Network effects through discovery + recommendations. Platform empowers creators to own audience.

name: Plaid
problem: Fintech apps can't easily connect to bank accounts
solution: API infrastructure for financial services
traction: 1K fintech companies integrated, millions of connections
market: Fintech infrastructure, powering future of finance
founder_signal: Zach Perret, William Hockey - engineers who felt the pain
a16z_thesis: Infrastructure layer for fintech. Network effects - more banks + apps create more value. Platform enables entire ecosystem.

name: Notion
problem: Work tools too fragmented - docs, wikis, tasks separate
solution: All-in-one workspace for notes, docs, wikis, projects
traction: 1M users, viral organic growth, passionate community
market: Productivity software, everyone who works on computer
founder_signal: Ivan Zhao - designer/engineer who spent years perfecting product
a16z_thesis: New paradigm for work software. Network effects through shared workspaces. Platform with blocks/integrations. Strong community moat.
